subject: (no subject)
body:
I have been trying to be extra cautious in not
involving myself in the mighty mouse "he said ,she said"( the
cartoon character that was always self  touted as  the
only one to "save the day"}.... I know he has done an excellent job of cutting expenses, and reorganizing your point of sale info system,, THis is a job he does well, simply administrate a process oriented task.. as chief administrator , not however is he competent with  anyt task outside this arena.    I am conflicted in
whether or not I should make you aware of the some of
the real history ;,  MM thought he was passed over for dean of
the business school.nonsense!..  acording to Larry ,
who refers to him derivesly as a "muppet" , the idea was self
generated and delusional.. as neil rudinstine the then
president ,  clearly thought   mm was merely  a "windbag"..     the facts
are not in dispute... I am hesitant to bring up his apparent 
true lack of "People skills "which I have heard
amazingly  touted as superb , , I am not sure you want
to be reminded that  he had not seen through , Jerry
GLazebrook.   an obviously disturbed character that
eventually got to the point of   threatening the family,,HArry could have
seen the obvious personality disorder, . I feel it
unnecessary to point out  that , it is my best
recollection that Jerry did not report to anyone but
mm. who while auditing your compensation for every
penny spent,at the same time  approved 100's of thousand of dollars of
bogus invioces .I am concious of your affection  for and commitment to mm
,and am undecided if i should re- call to your
attention the fact that He believedand partnered  whole heartedly with 
Fred at the Hospital, in the face of what was clearly the majority view,  and was unable to see through
fred's obvious bullshit,,In negotiations actually
taking Fred's side..vs.both  me and Marshall ,However as I understand it, It
didn't take John Wolfe much time however,to realize Fred's con.
,I realize that you are acutely aware that  he has alienated all of 
your attorney, your chief of staff, your in house
counsel, your private secretary, your wife,,, , he is
about to piss of the wife of John Wolfe re, the
columbus foundation, as once again "process" takes
precedent over common sense,...also unfortunately  for
him  probably not a good career move,, I have searched to 
give him the benefit of the doubt ,but have been unable to find people who support his interpersonal skills,  therefore I assumed
therefore that he must have a resovoir of  extraordinary businesss skills , to
compensates, but , it is
impossible to find a serious succesful transaction,
that he has completed in the past six years,,, he
screwed up sephora,I can't beleive it but  He was about to stick you with a
100 million dollar loss with the Accenture deal..First as a charitable contribution and then as a lopsided no hope business proposition.( I
wrote to you so you would have a record of the
ludicrousness of the proposal...I don't want to
alienate you, so I am being as gentle as I can,,,but it is apparent
he just doesn't get it..}  yankee candle.. in which
Forstmannn made over a billion dollars,,overpaid 
Frederick by a 100% ,compared to what he was willing to
take... ,And with pompousness and certainty  declared
categorically that the Amazon business model was
doomed to failure ,THis does not take away from his administrative talents,  I can go on.. ..   I cherish our
friendship, and when it came time for Abigails
decision not to go to Dubai ,you understand that  I beleive I  know how you think in
certain circumstances , therefore I am sympathetic to your
needing a person to rely on to carry out  certain tasks.... however
and most importantly, the irrefutable truth is , he clearly and irrefutably 
lacks the trust of the people closest to you ,
including your wife( who's judjement, you  certainly respect}, ,, Bruce, donna ,sam ,dennis, eddy,
,,,THis is crazy,,, None of the aforemetioned group,
beleives that  he would act in your best interest if
push came to shove..,,,THe triteness of the situation
can be illustarted  by the fact that  it is difficult
but necessary  for bruce ( who prefers paranoically  not even to talk on his phone in his own office} to have to consistantly leave
the room as the only alternative he feels is left open to him so
he doesn't have to listen one more time to how "
without me,, things would be really fucked up"...YOu might want to ask Abigail about the  recent ,I.T. , Wexner Center, Discussion ,  I believe that this information belongs to you, and under "gang stuff" rules I cannot simply be the repository of peoples hushed calls , and not  share with  you..If History is a guide  You
may now  decide not to return my  calls for
awhile,,, I hope not ,  but I am confident in the end 
that you will acknowledge  the unfortunate reality,
and my corresponding responsibility to bring it to your attention.     


__________________________________________________
